title: Shattering Zesty Dutch Cassaba Stamppot
description: A hearty, comforting Dutch dish featuring cassaba, fermented kimchi, and a hint of malty sweetness. Perfect for a cozy evening meal.
instructions: In a large pot, combine 2 cups of water and 1 cup of diced cassaba and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the cassaba is tender.
In a separate pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium heat and sauté 1 cup of kimchi for 5 minutes, or until slightly caramelized.
Add 1 tablespoon of butter to the pan and stir until melted, then stir in 1 cup of rye flour and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add 2 cups of grated potatoes, stirring constantly, and cook for 5 minutes, or until the potatoes are slightly tender.
Add the cooked cassaba, kimchi mixture, and 1 cup of grated Gruyère cheese to the pan, stirring until the cheese is melted and the mixture is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve hot, garnished with chopped chives if desired.
